notes: Package renamed from arcloop to arcrun (DECISION-001)
Streaming support adopted, pending arcllm support (DECISION-004)
Tool type: dataclass + factories, no subclassing (DECISION-008)
Tool.execute receives ToolContext with cancel signal (DECISION-010)
Events: generic Event with dict data (DECISION-013)
Text + tool_calls preserved in assistant message (DECISION-018)
jsonschema for param validation (DECISION-022, overrides PRD zero-dep constraint)
Dynamic tools denied by default in sandbox (DECISION-023)
Exceptions bubble up for model errors (DECISION-025)
Phase 1 implementation complete: 68 tests, 621 lines, mypy clean, ruff clean
Extracted _messages.py for shared message construction helpers (react.py + loop.py)
Steering was built into react.py from the start rather than added separately
Review complete: PASS. Applied 6 fixes (H-1,H-2,M-1,M-2,M-3,M-4). 70 tests, 623 lines.
Tool executor extraction designed (DECISION-026 through DECISION-031)
Executor: single tool call, tuple[Message, bool] return, strategy owns cancel/steer, executor increments counter, internal API
